arts.ttl: Martin O'Neill shares what 'sounds crazy' about Celtic winger Nicolas Kuhn
arts.sum: Martin O’Neill hails ‘terrific’ Celtic winger Nicolas Kuhn O’Neill added that Kuhn ‘knows what he is doing’, which to him, ‘sounds crazy’ because he doesn’t think that’s the norm with everyone else, as he told Sky Sports Football (23/11/24 at 7:15 pm).

arts.ttl: John McGinn says Celtic story 'winds me up' as Aston Villa skipper answers Parkhead transfer question
arts.sum: Join Football Scotland's Celtic WhatsApp community! Lifelong Hoops fan McGinn says it will be a strange feeling playing against his beloved club under the lights at Villa Park but confessed it grinds his gears when people mention the fact he could have been playing for the men in green-and-white.

arts.ttl: Confident Club Brugge star confesses he has ALREADY planned Celtic goal celebration as he welcomes 'fierce' atmosphere
arts.sum: Christos Tzolis hasn't been shy in talking up his sides chances at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Four-goal Club Brugge star makes native dance 'promise' if he scores at Celtic Park
arts.sum: A Club Brugge striker has vowed to perform the Sirtaki - the famous Greek dance - if he scores on Wednesday at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Adam Idah shares the 'unbelievable' Celtic memory so far he'll 'never forget'
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of Celtic’s clash with Club Brugge in the Champions League, Idah said the Bhoys’ 5-1 hammering of Slovan Bratislava is a memory that he’ll always remember. Adam Idah’s ‘unbelievable’ Champions League moment with Celtic and warning to Club Brugge

arts.ttl: Sky Sports sent SOS in Celtic ticket row after Hearts 'embarrassed' Scottish football
arts.sum: A limited number of tickets during he clash at Tynecastle has sparked a backlash from the Hoops' support

arts.ttl: John McGinn shares whether he would ever move to boyhood club Celtic
arts.sum: Despite various theories behind the switch that never was, Scotland international McGinn instead made his way to Villa Park and has since gone on to become club captain in the West Midlands. “I didn’t ever see myself playing for Aston Villa, but life happens, football changes and I’ve got two and a half years left to go at Villa.

arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston shares desire to make further Celtic history after 'unbelievable' Leipzig experience
arts.sum: Celtic are in action against Club Brugge this week and Alistair Johnston will be keen to continue his excellent form on Champions League duty after signing a new contract. Like always, Champions League nights are a unique selling point that help Celtic retain their prize assets.

arts.ttl: 'Empty seats'... John McGinn drops Celtic and Rangers truth bombs with Ange Postecoglou claim
arts.sum: The champions have already secured a comfortable win in the Glasgow derby this season, as well as putting six goals past Aberdeen, with McGinn seeing things pretty clearly. McGinn will lead Aston Villa out against Celtic in the Champions League in January, so he will get a taste of what Brendan Rodgers’ side are all about.

arts.ttl: 'It's alarming'... Kris Boyd is panicked at what Celtic are doing right now compared to Rangers
arts.sum: Celtic stretched their lead at the top of the Scottish Premiership at the weekend by beating Hearts after Rangers dropped points against Dundee United and Aberdeen lost at St Mirren. A win against Aberdeen in the league will stretch their lead at the top even further and beating Rangers in the upcoming League Cup final will secure the first piece of silverware against the under-pressure Ibrox club.
